message:
fix(web,scripts): miscellaneous fixes from concurrent agents

- crash-recovery-viz.tsx: variable reassignment fixes
- recursive-improvement-viz.tsx: cleanup unused variable
- generate.ts: manifest generator refinements
- error_tracking.sh: additional error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -158,8 +158,10 @@ try_step() {
                 rm -f "$fifo"
             else
                 # Fallback if mkfifo fails
+                set +e
                 "$@" 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
                 exit_code="${PIPESTATUS[0]}"
+                set -e
             fi
         else
             # Normal mode: capture silently, show on error
